subcodes.title: Words to Nuru'd-Din Mumtazi et al in May 1920
subcodes.first_line: You must neither praise nor speak ill of them [the communists]. You should say that the Cause of God has no objection specifically concerning them
subcodes.first_line_orig: هیچ کدام نه مدح کنید و نه ذم فقط بگوئید امر جمال مبارک با
subcodes.subjects: @wealth inequality and its moderation, @maintainance of degrees in society, @the economic problem and its solution; voluntary giving
